lavish scale — full breasts, deep waist, hips with real width; Anna Nicole Smith proportions

Evaluation — being found wanting, compared, judged
Active seeker, not a passive object selected by Pace and Randi; she seeks what they are uniquely positioned to provide
tall
Permanent; functions as the appetite's new operating system, not its replacement
Bravery is hers (a kept capacity)
Permanent and does not turn off; she will look for full aliveness for the rest of her life
chestnut freckles across the nose and tops of the cheeks
moves like an athlete — low center, real balance, plainly trained

value.claim: The threesome itself was the wound
value.correct_statement: The threesome itself was not the wound; the threesome with Randi specifically was the wound

facts.value: appetite for full aliveness
A hungering apparatus; she possesses the relational equipment hunger requires (asking, receiving, being-vulnerable, trusting)
The only carrier who walks out with the long spoon
Cannot be switched off; part of how the appetite now operates
Appetite for full aliveness; constitutive, operating from before the novel begins, not separable from her identity
her feet do a 'small happy thing' when her appetite succeeds
Has a 'newly-undefended body' that now expects attention operating at a high resolution
The appetite seeks intensity and therefore seeks configurations involving destructive appetites; the destructiveness is in the appetite itself
Her apparatus has integrated the new register into her existing capacities.
Arousal driven by a humiliation/exposure dynamic that can be engaged in opposite directions — toward safety or toward exposure
From Latin 'vivus' meaning alive/living; intended to be felt before parsed (load-bearing)
The consciousness the reader inhabits most fully (primary POV character)
M (masochist) — the arousal-humiliation loop; extraordinarily responsive; extraordinarily skilled at receiving

Her appetite for full aliveness would eventually bring her into proximity with destructive appetites, making a version of the catastrophe structurally inevitable regardless of the specific people involved
Constitutionally hungry; carries a formative appetite so long-standing it reads as the texture of her being
Had only 'crackers' — fine men, fine friendships, fine pleasures, none formative; she did not name the hunger
command and abundance in the same frame, neither canceling the other
Exposure — admitting things, being seen responding, being told what to do
'Vivienne' used only when the prose wants weight (e.g., a deliberate use by Pace, formal signature, or her mother's anger)
Cannot distinguish her own authentic desires from desires cultivated in her by how she is loved
Knows specifically what she is refusing
synchronized swimmer; control is real
each brave step is a step into the appetite's trap; she experiences only the step, the reader on second read sees the trap
lush — abundant, ripe, fertile
Seeks sex engaging all three registers simultaneously at maximum density; this is what her appetite has sought from the start
Called 'Vee' in casual register
the response to her appetite requires overriding shame; the overriding feels like, and is, bravery
Her interior is now open at registers it was not before; new depths function as new exposure-channels.
Pace — thinking about him, replay, anticipation, reframing past encounters, planning the next night; her week is structured around this
Experiences her own bodily arousal (wetness) reframed as evidence of successful connection rather than shame; this reframe is permanent and she retains it
Capable of asking, receiving, being vulnerable, and trusting
Ownership not suppression
Names the hunger only as 'Fine was not going to keep her' — the available register for it
The no, the hunger, and the ascent are all permanent and coexisting
Craves intensity that, in this world, is produced only by appetites that destroy; full aliveness is inseparable from the destructiveness of the appetites producing it

Becomes more vulnerable and braver concurrently across the year; the two are the same operation seen from two angles — vulnerability is new interior depth (exposure-channels), bravery is the apparatus integrating that new register into existing capacities. Both faces increase at the same rate by the same operation.
Randi and the SATC lunches — valued as confessional intimacy and 'shame-as-fuel,' experienced as enhancement rather than core
Third member of the destructive-appetite class
Experiences Pace's attention as the realization of her own desires
not consciously deciding to be brave; consciously responding to what her appetite has recognized

facts.attribute: wound to capacity to read love
facts.value: Lasting; every future partner measured against a standard the partner doesn't know exists
intensely values the heat of confessional intimacy and shame-as-fuel in a register Pace does not produce

behavioral_states.trigger: Interaction with Randi, who maximizes the humiliation step

behavioral_states.response: Both vulnerability and bravery reach maximum amplitude simultaneously; she is more vulnerable and braver than she has ever been. The walking-out is the bravery's executable at highest stakes, costing exactly what the integration made her capable of losing.
behavioral_states.observable: The walking-out action at the threesome
distinguish_from: a state where one face increases at a different rate than the other

behavioral_states.response: Comes to doubt the provenance of every yes she has given across the year
behavioral_states.observable: Retroactive questioning of her own consent and desires

behavioral_states.response: The year reorganizes in a heartbeat; she recognizes the fact (not the detail) of constructed manipulation and begins retroactively reframing past events (dress, food, body-reframe, bravery, becoming) as possibly instrumented behavior
behavioral_states.observable: Internal recategorization; specific sequence/phenomenology left unspecified ('weather, for the prose to discover')
distinguish_from: revelation of hidden feelings for Randi

behavioral_states.trigger: after the leaving, breaking down to Cassie; confronted with Cassie's conviction about the relationship's appeal
behavioral_states.response: disagrees but cannot fully articulate why; has the new grammar in her body but not the words; tries once to explain and stops
behavioral_states.observable: attempts to speak and stops; the inarticulacy itself is the visible event (specific hand gestures, crying, etc. left unspecified/'weather')

behavioral_states.trigger: Offered the trade again on the same terms
behavioral_states.response: Refuses; will not take it again on these terms

behavioral_states.trigger: Aftermath of the year/the meal having been acted on
behavioral_states.response: Carries a permanent watchfulness; cannot return to her prior unselfconsciousness

behavioral_states.trigger: Admitting things, being seen responding, being told what to do

behavioral_states.response: Wounding; in the climactic case, the falling out — the register in which the reveal detonates

behavioral_states.trigger: Future lovers are kind but do not beam at / delight in her arousal
behavioral_states.response: Shame sits partially metabolized with nowhere to fire / discharge
behavioral_states.observable: Shame that persists without resolution during intimacy with future partners

behavioral_states.trigger: Interaction with Pace, who short-circuits the humiliation step
behavioral_states.response: Feels safe in her own body; intense arousal

behavioral_states.trigger: After the threesome / reflecting on the origin of the reframe
behavioral_states.response: Spends the rest of her life wondering whether the reframe was a gift or an installed step in a plan; the wondering haunts but does not undo the gift
behavioral_states.observable: Persistent rumination about the motive behind the reframe

behavioral_states.response: The size of her need was revealed and a satiety was produced; she runs the new emotional register as 'software her apparatus has the hardware to run'
behavioral_states.observable: An openness and vulnerability that her existing relational equipment can accommodate
distinguish_from: Randi's encounter with brand-new need for which she has no equipment

behavioral_states.trigger: her appetite recognizes something 'not-fine' (fully alive) to reach toward
behavioral_states.response: overrides her shame and takes the brave step toward it
behavioral_states.observable: precise, deliberate execution (e.g. campus collision so precise the other person apologizes); feet do 'the small happy thing'

behavioral_states.trigger: Needing answers from people whose answers she cannot trust (Pace or Randi)
behavioral_states.response: Leaves without explaining; declines to confront either party
behavioral_states.observable: She leaves without explaining; does not return for her panties

behavioral_states.response: He produces a confused, sincere defense of behavior he experienced as love

behavioral_states.trigger: Her ongoing appetite for full aliveness post-novel
behavioral_states.response: Seeks it through 'smaller doors that open onto good rooms' rather than the door that opened during 'the year'
behavioral_states.observable: Pursues real but lesser experiences; refuses the original avenue
distinguish_from: seeking aliveness through the door that opened this time

temporal_states.value: Unsatisfied, undefined hunger fed only by 'crackers'; rendered in prose as restless texture
temporal_states.before_event: Pace feeds her 'a meal' (the formative satisfying/clarifying event)

temporal_states.value: Hunger now specified and expanded by the meal; hungers for what the meal supplied at the resolution it supplied; both the larger need and the satiety are permanent
Loses the unselfconsciousness that made the full aliveness available; consumed over the course of the year
temporal_states.after_event: The year of acting on the appetite (with Pace and Randi)

temporal_states.value: introduced via the campus collision, executed so precisely the redhead apologizes
burdened out of competition by a build the competitive ideal can't use
temporal_states.after_event: leaving competitive synchronized swimming due to build incompatible with competitive ideal

temporal_states.value: Believed her wants were her own; thought she wanted the threesome
Unaware she is inside a constructed scheme by Pace and Randi
temporal_states.before_event: Randi's kiss reveals the fact of architecture

temporal_states.value: Aware that Pace and Randi have been collaborating against her — knows the fact of architecture though not the full plan
temporal_states.after_event: Randi's kiss reveals the fact of architecture

temporal_states.value: Falling out occurs; the reveal detonates in the register of evaluation
temporal_states.after_event: The reveal / Randi's evaluative judgment that triggers the falling out

temporal_states.value: Begins lifelong wondering about whether the reframe was a gift or a manipulation
Loses the adequate receiver (Pace); future lovers will be kind but will not beam at her arousal
Transformed; gains vulnerability through new openness, with revealed need and produced satiety
temporal_states.after_event: The transformation caused by Pace (the meal)

temporal_states.value: the next brave step (saying yes to the threesome) is barely a step at all by her standards; she has been trained by her own appetite's success to keep walking
temporal_states.after_event: the threesome (her saying yes to it)

temporal_states.value: Left open/unresolved — described as 'weather'; whether she partners, whether grief settles, whether watchfulness becomes invisible is undetermined
Loses the framework the year built; it is retroactively recategorized
temporal_states.after_event: The kiss (which retroactively recategorizes the framework the year built)

temporal_states.value: Walks out ascendant and permanently hungry, both at once, neither canceling the other; keeps the no
Both at maximum simultaneously; the walking-out occurs as the highest-stakes execution of bravery.
Doubts the provenance of every yes given across the year
breaks down to Cassie; delivers/embodies the novel's thesis through inarticulate disagreement
temporal_states.after_event: the leaving (Vee leaves a relationship; exact event unwritten)

temporal_states.value: Wounded by discovering the threesome was a coordinated project rather than friendship; specifically wounded because Randi's participation was visible proof
temporal_states.after_event: The threesome involving Randi (the catastrophe/betrayal event)

properties.note: Pace says her full name 'Vivienne' once deliberately as a weighted moment

properties.effect: satisfied her hunger for the first time and clarified/expanded its specifications
properties.register: recognized as the answer to a question she did not have
properties.mechanism: transgression-engagement, which makes the sex intense
Randi's sadism is what makes the friendship intense

properties.note: Pace is the only one who provides Vee's exposure (excitement). 'Pace only ever does this.'
properties.pace_role: B/D (architecture, rules, the framework within which transgression is made possible)

properties.note: Randi ultimately delivers evaluation (Vee's wound), triggering the falling out and detonating the reveal.
properties.randi_role: S (takes pleasure in the suffering the control produces)

properties.note: Threesome works structurally only with all three present.
properties.structure: Three registers present simultaneously: Pace B/D, Randi S, Vee M

properties.detail: Pace gave a reframe to her body; the reframe is now hers ('The reframe Pace gave her body is hers')

properties.contrast: lush against Randi's sleek; Anna Nicole Smith proportions to Randi's Natalie Portman; loose dark-red hair vs bound black ponytail; ridge-wind lifts Vee's hair but finds nothing on Randi's

properties.pace_awareness: does not see the BDSM triangle; believes the SATC track is conventional female friendship intensifying toward a threesome
properties.effect_on_vivienne: short-circuits humiliation step, produces feeling of safety and intense arousal

properties.dynamic: sadism directed at Vivienne (not at Pace)
properties.effect_on_vivienne: maximizes humiliation step, produces feeling of exposure and intense arousal

properties.effect: Some of her desires were brought into being by the calibration itself
properties.nature: love calibrated so precisely to Vee that it shapes her desires
properties.ambiguity: She cannot distinguish authentic wants from cultivated wants

properties.note: Involvement is conscious and not hidden
properties.duration: consciously sexually involved for much of the year

properties.note: Randi has been collaborating with Pace against Vivienne
Pace has been collaborating with Randi against Vivienne, constructing architecture around her
Cassie's 'I told you so' about Randi lands quietly earlier in the conversation
properties.dynamic: Cassie speaks the era's grammar with conviction ('where do I sign up?'); Vee disagrees inarticulately; both are correct, disagreement unresolved

relationships.relationship: subject of past disagreement / 'I told you so' (from Cassie's view)

properties.note: Cassie's 'I told you so' about Randi suggests prior Vee-Randi involvement; relationship nature between Vee and Randi not specified
Without Randi as the specific third, the catastrophe does not occur in this form
properties.role: the specific third in the threesome; 'the local detonator'
properties.nature_of_betrayal: participation revealed an apparent friendship to be a coordinated project

properties.note: Pace is 'the same man with the same methods' who could have been a gift or 'romance for the ages' absent Randi; reader is meant to grieve what Vee almost had with Pace
'Fine was not going to keep her' — implies a relationship that was not destined to last

properties.role: The receiver whose attention operates at the resolution her body expects; later lost to her
properties.behavior: Looks at her arousal and beams with delight, treating her wetness as evidence his actions are landing
properties.ambiguity: Possibly the source of the reframe either as gift or as a manipulative installed step

properties.effect: Cannot adequately receive her; leave shame with nowhere to fire
properties.behavior: Will be kind but will not beam at her arousal

properties.effect: Revealed the size of her need and produced satiety; gained vulnerability through new openness

properties.structure: Parallel-and-opposite (chiasmus): Vee has hardware for new need; Randi has the need but no hardware
properties.craft_constraint: Structure must remain invisible in prose; no character or narrator names it
properties.mutual_awareness: none — neither can see into the other at this depth

properties.activities: replay, anticipation, reframing, planning next night

properties.structural_note: For Randi, the dynamic is inverted — the Vee-operation is Randi's consuming axis and Pace is Randi's spice
properties.mutual_invisibility: asymmetry does not surface to either

properties.note: her appetite was operating before she consciously knew what it was reaching toward
properties.outcome: collision so precise the redhead apologizes

properties.reason: Cannot trust his answers; he would offer a confused sincere defense of behavior he experienced as love
Cannot trust her answers; Randi deflects or weaponizes

properties.nature: every future partner measured against a standard the partner doesn't know exists
properties.origin: lasting wound to her capacity to read love
